name: odoo-ai-agents
description: Odoo AI workforce toolkit — 40 skills + 7 specialist agents + 9 workflow commands across engineering, sales, marketing, strategy, onboarding, visual UI testing, and git-wave orchestration. Pairs with the odoo-semantic-mcp server for indexed-codebase grounding (auto-installed). Includes browser-automation agents for Odoo UI review and automated setup.
